title: Truuine

{{Quote|According to texts, it was located deep within the mountains of Truuine's polar region, with a commanding view of glaciers shedding icebergs into the ocean.|Amara's Shadowfeed, on the Truuine Jedi Praxeum|<ref name="FDCR" />}}
'''Truuine''' was an [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Waterworld/Legends|waterworld]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It featured an equatorial belt of islands as well as a polar region with [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] and [[Water/Legends|glaciers]]. By [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], the planet was the site of the [[Truuine Jedi Praxeum]], a [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] facility established by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mroon Jassa]]. Around that [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Kith Kark]] visited Truuine and encountered Jassa, which eventually led to the former taking up [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] studies at the [[Jedi Praxeum|Praxeum]]. During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] later, Truuine's islands were home to [[Karkarodon/Legends|Karkarodon]] and [[Patrolian/Legends|Patrolian]] [[Colonist/Legends|settlers]].

==Description==
Truuine was the only [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Truuine system/Legends|Truuine system]]. [[Orbit/Legends|Orbiting]] at least one [[Star/Legends|sun]], the planet<ref name="TOTJC" /> constituted a part of the regions known as the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]<ref name="EAOC" /> and [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]]. Between [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]] and [[3996 BBY]], Truuine lay on a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that linked it to the [[Prindaar system/Legends|Antar]] and [[Pyrshak system|Manaan systems]].<ref name="TEA" />

Truuine's surface was [[Waterworld/Legends|covered]] by an [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] that was punctured on the equator by a belt of islands.<ref name="FDCR" /> In addition, the planet's northern<ref name="TOTJC" /> polar region featured [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] and [[Water/Legends|glaciers]], the latter of which continuously created icebergs in the ocean. Wildlife on Truuine included [[Fish/Legends|fish]].<ref name="FDCR" />

==History==
By 5000 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], Truuine was situated well within the area widely [[Scout/Legends|explored]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="TEA" /> Several [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] before<ref name="TOTJC" /> [[3998 BBY]],<ref name="Dates">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] depicts [[Kith Kark]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] immediately prior to his involvement in the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[3998 BBY]]. ''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' states that Kark left the [[Truuine Jedi Praxeum]] for Ossus no less than three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after his initial arrival on Truuine, which can therefore be placed in approximately [[4001 BBY]].</ref> the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mroon Jassa]] established a<ref name="TOTJC" /> [[Truuine Jedi Praxeum|Jedi Praxeum]] on the planet.<ref name="FDCR" />

===The quest of Kith Kark===
{{Quote|An ancient Jedi parable over four thousand year old tells of a Gotal named Kith Kark and his quest to become a Jedi Knight. While the Jedi likely created the tale to teach initiates Jedi values, Master Jassa's Praxeum may have been real.|Amara's Shadowfeed|<ref name="FDCR" />}}
[[File:KithKarkHead-FNU1.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Kith Kark began his Jedi training on Truuine.]]
A group of [[Padawan/Legends|Jedi apprentices]] traveled to the planet<ref name="TOTJC" /> by [[4001 BBY]]<ref name="Dates" /> in order to begin their [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] under Jassa. Shortly after their arrival, the trainees met the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Kith Kark]], who had come to visit Truuine on a sightseeing trip. The group of apprentices, joined by Kark, then traveled to Jassa's [[Jedi Praxeum|training compound]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Master welcomed the students but not Kark, whom he refused to train as a Jedi.<ref name="TOTJC" />

The offended Kark left Truuine, but he returned a [[4000 BBY/Legends|year later]] after extensively studying Jedi-related texts and documents. However, Jassa once again rejected the Gotal. Leaving Truuine for the second [[Time/Legends|time]], Kark spent the [[3999 BBY|following year]] trying to understand what he had missed in his studies that had led Jassa to reject him. Eventually, the Gotal realized that his mistake had been<ref name="TOTJC" /> viewing the studying and use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] as a vocation instead of a duty.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|141|Jassa, Mroon}}</ref>

Once again returning to Truuine, Kark used his revelation to finally convince Jassa that he was ready to begin training as a Jedi. The Gotal trainee studied on Truuine for a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] until Jassa was called away on an assignment elsewhere, leading Kark and the other apprentices of the Praxeum to leave to finish their training on<ref name="TOTJC" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="TEA Ossus">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> planet [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]].<ref name="TOTJC" />

===Lost history===
At some point after the [[Declaration of a New Order|establishment]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="FDCR" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] [[Amara (information broker)|Amara]] mentioned Truuine on a [[Amara's Shadowfeed|private shadowfeed]]. While the feed dismissed Kark's experiences on Truuine as a parable invented by the Jedi, it acknowledged that the historical existence of Jassa's Jedi Praxeum might have been factual.<ref name="FDCR" />

==Inhabitants==
By the time the Galactic Empire [[Imperial Era/Legends|reigned]], Truuine's equatorial band of islands had been settled by [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Karkarodon/Legends|Karkarodon]] and [[Patrolian/Legends|Patrolian]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. Disputes between the two settler groups over [[Fishing/Legends|fishing]] and [[Merchant/Legends|trading]] rights eventually degenerated into a violent [[Truuine conflict|conflict]], which led several [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] to avoid visiting Truuine.<ref name="FDCR" />

==Locations==
{{Quote|Welcome to my humble compound, apprentice.|Mroon Jassa, to Kith Kark|<ref name="TOTJC" />}}
Truuine's northern<ref name="TOTJC" /> polar region was the site of the Truuine Jedi Praxeum,<ref name="FDCR" /> a small training compound established by Jedi Master Mroon Jassa.<ref name="TOTJC" /> The Praxeum was located deep within the mountains of the area, at a site that featured an impressive view of glaciers giving rise to icebergs.<ref name="FDCR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Truuine was first mentioned in the [[1996]] [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'', written by [[George R. Strayton]] and published by [[West End Games]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="TOTJC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Truuine [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Truuine, within grid square O-11.<ref name="TEA" />
